metadata.description: Deferred manual Serum VST2 controlled-diff probe pack for end-of-run FXP collection.

checkpoints.title: Voicing and global tail
checkpoints.objective: Prove the 40-43 voicing toggle strip, then map the 166-175 global/voicing tail and 172-173 pitch-or-misc subpair.

probes.label: Note Latch
fallback_presets: /Library/Audio/Presets/Xfer Records/Serum 2 Presets/Presets/S1 Presets/Garage/Sub- Turn The Page.fxp
probes.notes: Flip only Note Latch and keep all other voicing controls fixed.

probes.label: Polyphony Count
fallback_presets: /Library/Audio/Presets/Xfer Records/Serum 2 Presets/Presets/S1 Presets/Garage/Lead - If U Ever.fxp
probes.notes: Change only Polyphony Count to isolate the dominant discrete slot in the 166-175 tail.

probes.label: Bend Range Up/Down
probes.recommended_preset: /Library/Audio/Presets/Xfer Records/Serum 2 Presets/Presets/S1 Presets/Speed Garage/Warp- Speed On Smoke.fxp
fallback_presets: /Library/Audio/Presets/Xfer Records/Serum 2 Presets/Presets/S1 Presets/Speed Garage/Warp- Don't Stop.fxp
/Library/Audio/Presets/Xfer Records/Serum 2 Presets/Presets/S1 Presets/Speed Garage/Warp- Big W.fxp
probes.notes: Prefer Bend Range Up first. If noisy, retry with Bend Range Down on the same preset family.

checkpoints.title: Ambiguous FX corridors
checkpoints.objective: Use enum and BPM-sync probes to collapse the 88-96 and 121-130 corridors into narrower FX families.

probes.label: EQ TypL / EQ TypH
probes.recommended_preset: /Library/Audio/Presets/Xfer Records/Serum 2 Presets/Presets/S1 Presets/Garage/Sub- Turn The Page.fxp
probes.notes: Best current EQ-type candidates because 88-96 is active, 161 is on, and the surrounding 154-163 state is relatively sparse.

probes.label: Cho_BPM_Sync / Flg_BPM_Sync
probes.notes: The warp pair is the best current match for the 121-130 corridor and already shows a sync-friendly 127/128 pattern.

checkpoints.title: FX enable block ordering
checkpoints.objective: Use one-module enable toggles to pin the 154-163 FX enable block and disambiguate the 158/161/162 anchors.

probes.label: EQ On
probes.notes: Best current EQ-enable candidates because 161 is off while the 88-96 strip is still active enough to make the flip audible.

probes.label: Delay On
fallback_presets: /Library/Audio/Presets/Xfer Records/Serum 2 Presets/Presets/S1 Presets/Garage/Sub- Turn The Page.fxp
/Library/Audio/Presets/Xfer Records/Serum 2 Presets/Presets/S1 Presets/Speed Garage/Warp- Big W.fxp
probes.notes: Keeps the 121-130 delay-side corridor alive while leaving 158 off or less dominant before the toggle.

probes.label: Hyper On / Filter On
fallback_presets: /Library/Audio/Presets/Xfer Records/Serum 2 Presets/Presets/S1 Presets/Garage/Sub- Turn The Page.fxp
/Library/Audio/Presets/Xfer Records/Serum 2 Presets/Presets/S1 Presets/Speed Garage/Bass- Turn Back Time.fxp
probes.notes: Use Hyper first to split the 162/163 boundary. Filter On is the explicit fallback if Hyper is too noisy.

checkpoints.title: Portamento corridor and slot 44 neighbor
checkpoints.objective: Resolve the 137-145 portamento/global corridor and separate slot 44 from the 40-43 voicing toggle block.

probes.label: Portamento Time / Curve / Porta Mode / Porta Scaled
probes.notes: Run the same shortlist through all four portamento controls before moving to the slot 44 probe.

probes.label: Slot 44 neighbor probe
probes.notes: Run this after the portamento probes. The goal is to prove slot 44 is a separate continuous neighbor.

checkpoints.title: Macro and matrix tail
checkpoints.objective: Use macro and matrix edits to resolve the late-stage macro/matrix surfaces and any remaining tail ambiguity.

probes.label: Macro rename
probes.notes: Lead- Just has four already-named macros, so a rename-only save should stay isolated cleanly.

probes.label: Macro amount
probes.notes: Lead- Saturn has a single named macro on a sparse lead, so macro depth movement should be easier to isolate.

probes.label: Mod route add/remove
fallback_presets: /Library/Audio/Presets/Xfer Records/Serum 2 Presets/Presets/S1 Presets/Garage/Reese - If Bass could kill.fxp
probes.notes: Pad- June has an obvious LFO hint and no custom macro clutter, making route add/remove easier to isolate.

probes.label: Matrix Curve change
fallback_presets: /Library/Audio/Presets/Xfer Records/Serum 2 Presets/Presets/S1 Presets/Garage/Reese - If Bass could kill.fxp
probes.notes: Wide reese patches show the strongest combination of LFO activity and restrained envelope shape for a matrix-curve probe.
